field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '费用报销单', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'claim_flow_label', 'claim_type', 'direction', 'business_category_id', 'source_origin']}, {'title': '项目与往来', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'operation_strategy', 'company_id', 'company_name_text', 'partner_id', 'payment_request_id', 'applicant_name', 'department_name']}, {'title': '报销事项', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['expense_type', 'summary', 'date_claim', 'fill_date', 'handling_kind', 'business_axis']}, {'title': '金额与付款', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount', 'approved_amount', 'paid_amount', 'unpaid_amount', 'currency_id', 'payment_state', 'payment_method', 'payment_anchor_policy']}, {'title': '收付款账户', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['payee', 'receipt_account_name', 'payee_account', 'payee_bank', 'payment_account_name', 'payer_account', 'payer_bank']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'reject_reason', 'return_reason']}, {'title': '审批与协同', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['can_review', 'reviewer_ids', 'review_ids', 'next_review', 'need_validation', 'validated', 'rejected', 'has_comment']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_no', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'claim_flow_label', 'sequence': 40, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'claim_type', 'sequence': 50, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'direction', 'sequence': 60, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 70, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'source_origin', 'sequence': 80, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 90, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'operation_strategy', 'sequence': 100, 'group_title': '项目与往来', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 110, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'company_name_text', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '项目与往来', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 130, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'payment_request_id', 'sequence': 140, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'applicant_name', 'sequence': 150, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'department_name', 'sequence': 160, 'group_title': '项目与往来'}, {'name': 'expense_type', 'sequence': 170, 'group_title': '报销事项'}, {'name': 'summary', 'sequence': 180, 'group_title': '报销事项'}, {'name': 'date_claim', 'sequence': 190, 'group_title': '报销事项'}, {'name': 'fill_date', 'sequence': 200, 'group_title': '报销事项'}, {'name': 'handling_kind', 'sequence': 210, 'group_title': '报销事项'}, {'name': 'business_axis', 'sequence': 220, 'group_title': '报销事项', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'amount', 'sequence': 230, 'group_title': '金额与付款'}, {'name': 'approved_amount', 'sequence': 240, 'group_title': '金额与付款'}, {'name': 'paid_amount', 'sequence': 250, 'group_title': '金额与付款', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'unpaid_amount', 'sequence': 260, 'group_title': '金额与付款', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 270, 'group_title': '金额与付款'}, {'name': 'payment_state', 'sequence': 280, 'group_title': '金额与付款', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'payment_method', 'sequence': 290, 'group_title': '金额与付款'}, {'name': 'payment_anchor_policy', 'sequence': 300, 'group_title': '金额与付款', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'payee', 'sequence': 310, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'receipt_account_name', 'sequence': 320, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'payee_account', 'sequence': 330, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'payee_bank', 'sequence': 340, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'payment_account_name', 'sequence': 350, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'payer_account', 'sequence': 360, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'payer_bank', 'sequence': 370, 'group_title': '收付款账户'}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 380, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 390, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'reject_reason', 'sequence': 400, 'group_title': '说明与附件', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'return_reason', 'sequence': 410, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'can_review', 'sequence': 420, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'reviewer_ids', 'sequence': 430, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'review_ids', 'sequence': 440, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'next_review', 'sequence': 450, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'need_validation', 'sequence': 460, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validated', 'sequence': 470, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'rejected', 'sequence': 480, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'has_comment', 'sequence': 490, 'group_title': '审批与协同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_model', 'sequence': 500, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_table', 'sequence': 510, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 520, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_no', 'sequence': 530, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state', 'sequence': 540, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'creator_name', 'sequence': 550, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'created_time', 'sequence': 560, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 570, 'group_title': '来源追溯'} ] } } } }

field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '付款保证金退回', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'claim_flow_label', 'claim_type', 'direction', 'business_category_id', 'source_origin']}, {'title': '项目与保证金', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'operation_strategy', 'company_id', 'company_name_text', 'partner_id', 'guarantee_type', 'guarantee_project_name', 'payment_request_id']}, {'title': '退回事项', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['expense_type', 'summary', 'date_claim', 'fill_date', 'is_returned', 'return_reason', 'handling_kind', 'business_axis']}, {'title': '金额与责任余额', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount', 'approved_amount', 'paid_amount', 'unpaid_amount', 'currency_id', 'company_contractor_responsibility_state', 'company_contractor_arrival_unprocessed_amount', 'company_contractor_self_funding_balance', 'company_contractor_responsibility_notice']}, {'title': '收付款账户', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['payee', 'receipt_account_name', 'payee_account', 'payee_bank', 'payment_account_name', 'payer_account', 'payer_bank', 'payment_method']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'reject_reason']}, {'title': '审批与协同', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['can_review', 'reviewer_ids', 'review_ids', 'next_review', 'need_validation', 'validated', 'rejected', 'has_comment']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_no', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state',
